Building 4 (Northwest)
655 W 54th Av - 5 Dwelling Units (1st - 3rd Level)

Address and suite numbers assigned as per approved plans for Fire and Emergency response. The address numbers are to be posted on the building to be visible from the street and the suite numbers are to be posted at the suite entries in accordance with the Building By-law prior to final inspection.
description:
Building Permit for BP-2025-01134

To construct 3-storey multiple dwelling buildings consisting of 5 dwelling units Building 4, over one level of underground parking with storage, bike storage, and service rooms, having vehicular access from the rear lane.

This is a CP Process Permit and the applicant is Sayed (Peter) Pouriya Hosseini, P.Eng., CP.

Building to be sprinklered to NFPA 13.

*REVIEWED UNDER VBBL 2019

Refer to BP-2025-01899 for Building 1
Refer to BP-2025-01900 for Building 2
Refer to BP-2025-01901 for Building 3
Refer to BP-2025-01902 for Building 4

STAGED CONSTRUCTION
Stage 1: Excavation, Shoring & Foundation to Grade (UNDER REVIEW)
